name: Ackrell SPAC Partners I Co.
summary: Ackrell SPAC Partners I Co. does not have significant operations. It intends to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company intends to focus on alcoholic and non-alcoholic beverage and wellness sectors. Ackrell SPAC Partners I Co. was founded in 2018 and is Claymont, Delaware.
